license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kbacsie
title: Diet-induced obesity murine model
author: Bianca Hemmeryckx

steps_raw.instruction: Randomize 8-weeks old male mice (C57BL/6J, C57BL/6N or gene-deficient mice with control littermates) to two groups based on body weight.

Give one group 7g standard chow (SFD, 10.9 kJ/g) each day/mouse, and the other group 7g western high-fat diet (HFD, 22 kJ/g; kcal from fat 42%, 43% from carbohydrates and 15% from protein) for 15 weeks. As food intake averages 4g/day, the animals are fed ad libitum. Provide drinking water ad libitum. ssniff® EF R/M acc. TD88137 mod Contributed by users Catalog #E15721-34

House the animals in a temperature (20-23°C) and humidity (30-40%)-controlled room with a 12-hour light/dark cycle (7AM/7PM). Give 1-2 small wooden sticks to every cage containing mice on a HFD in order to allow correct wearing off of their teeth.
Replace each diet weekly, record food intake and body weight weekly.
After 15 weeks of diet administration, fast animals for 6 hours (7:30 AM – 1:30 PM).

Determine blood glucose levels on a drop of blood taken from the nicked tail of a free-moving mouse using the Accu-Chek Aviva meter and Accu-Chek Aviva glucose strips. Accu-Chek Aviva glucose strips Contributed by users Catalog #06453970

Sacrifice animals by intraperitoneal injection of 60 mg/kg sodium pentobarbital (Nembutal) or Dolethal. -Nembutal (60 mg/ml): we make 10x dilution with saline.-Dolethal (200 mg/ml): we make 30x dilution with saline. Nembutal 60 mg/ml Contributed by users Dolethal 200 mg/ml Contributed by users
When animals are asleep, collect blood from the retro-orbital sinus on trisodium citrate and processed for plasma (http://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.j9dcr26). Store plasma in aliquots at -80°C.

Immobilize the animals, cut open the chest and wash out the heart and the entire circulatory system with saline by putting a perfusion needle in the apex (left ventricle). Make a small cut in the right atrium to allow blood to flow out. Microflex Infusion set, orange Contributed by users Catalog #240.05
Make a midline incision in the skin and make a incision at the height of the hind limbs.
Pull skin to the side so the inguinal subcutaneous white adipose tissue (sWAT) depots are visible. Remove the internal lymph nodes. Dissect out the sWAT depots.
Make a midline incision in the muscle layer to open the abdominal cavity.
Locate the intra-abdominal gonadal (GON) WAT depots and liver. Removed them.
Flip the mouse, locate the interscapular brown adipose tissue depot and remove it.
Weigh all dissected organs.
Make portions of each tissue for RNA, protein extraction or histology.
Snap-freeze the portions for RNA and protein extraction and store at -80°C.
Process the portions for histology (see separate protocol).
Clean dissection material and bench with Vircon S, detergent, water and 70% ethanol. Virkon™ S 5O tablets/bottle Fisher Scientific Catalog #NC9821357
Dispose of the animal body according to internal institutional guidelines.
Replace drinking water and change the cages every week. Check the health of the animals every day.
